title: alstroemeria xavantinensis
intro: Alstroemeria xavantinensis, also known as the Peruvian Inca lily, is a flowering plant species native to Peru and Bolivia. While there is limited information on its medicinal properties, Alstroemeria xavantinensis is used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. However, no specific health benefits or herbal preparations have been identified, and further research is needed to confirm its potential uses.
